MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-08-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, To Compel Responses To Requests For Production, To Compel Documents And For Sanctions From Plaintiff And Plaintiffs Counsel Of Record
Off Calendar Jul-15-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JEFFREY NEUSTADT's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, To Compel Responses To Requests For Production, To Compel Documents And For Sanctions From Plaintiff And Plaintiffs Counsel Of Record.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is off calendar. Dismissal of entire action filed June 28, 2021.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2021 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-02-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JEFFREY NEUSTADT'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Jeffrey Neustadt's motion to strike is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 435.5, which requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before such a motion is filed. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with the law.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR No. 7855, Email: eric.throne.csr@gmail.com, Tel: 707-305-8964 (302/RBU)

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Jul-02-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JEFFREY NEUSTADT'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Jeffrey Neustadt's motion for judgment on the pleadings is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 439, which requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before such a motion is filed. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with the law.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR No. 7855, Email: eric.throne.csr@gmail.com, Tel: 707-305-8964 (302/RBU)
